_comment: Production hub-spoke with NVA. The az CLI (or ARM API response deserialized through certain SDK wrappers) returns nextHopIpAddress as a bare string instead of a one-element array. This is a known serialization variation: ARM returns the field as an array in the API spec, but some CLI versions or custom tooling that serializes the API response differently may emit a string. The UDR pointing to the NVA firewall (10.4.0.1) is the only route out for 172.16.0.0/12 traffic.
